general.viewportNote: Viewport render options (AO, shadows) are controlled from the Display workbench tab.
general.phaeleonNote: Phaeleon uses a fixed three-column layout (Input · Analysis · Inspector). Panel widths and analysis behavior are configured in the Workspace tab.

workspace.layoutHint: Pick how the Data, Viewport, Inspector, and Assistant panels are arranged. Panel positions are fixed — use presets or reset to change the layout.
workspace.sequenceDockHeightHint: {{px}} px (also resizable by dragging the handle above the sequence dock)

presets.classicHint: Data · Viewport · Inspector, with the Assistant docked below the Inspector.
presets.focusHint: Maximize the viewport with slim side columns; Assistant tabs onto the Inspector. Great for presenting or learning.
presets.analysisHint: Wide Inspector with the Assistant as a tab — for data-heavy, in-depth analysis.
presets.assistantHint: A large Assistant region on the right with the Inspector beneath it — for conversational exploration.
presets.compactHint: Narrow side panels with compact density — for small screens and laptops.

workspace.saveNote: Use the header Save button (⌘S) to write a full workspace snapshot including dock layout and AI preferences. Export JSON via the Download menu.

phaeleonWorkspace.layoutHint: Choose a layout for how you work — switch instantly, no confirmation.
phaeleonWorkspace.customLayout: Custom layout — dimensions differ from every preset.

presets.consultHint: Read the report and ask AI side by side.
presets.classicHint: 3-panel view: input, report, and inspector side by side. AI docked under inspector.

phaeleonWorkspace.analysisModeHint: Rules-only runs locally. Rules + AI sends the assessment to your configured assistant for review.
phaeleonWorkspace.autoAnalyzeHint: Run interaction analysis when both Drug A and Drug B are assigned.
phaeleonWorkspace.autoOpenChatHint: Focus the assistant column when an interaction report is ready.
phaeleonWorkspace.fuzzySearchHint: Try alternate spellings and typo patterns when OpenFDA returns no exact match.

about.copyright: © 2026 Biolabs made with pistolinkr named by g.gear service delta team.

helix.stack: Structure: NGL · Layout: Dockview · AI: modular cloud providers

phaeleon.stack: Search: FDA OpenFDA · Assessment: rule-based + optional AI review · Layout: Frame B shell

ai.notConfigured: Add at least one provider API key above to use the assistant.
ai.providerHealthHint: Live failover status. Blocked providers cool down automatically and requests switch to the next model/provider.
ai.preferredProviderHint: When set to Auto, OpenRouter is tried first, then Gemini, then Hugging Face.
ai.interfaceLanguageHint: Controls menus, panel titles, labels, and messages across the workstation.
ai.responseLanguageHint: When set to a specific language, the interface switches to match. For 中文 / Deutsch / Español etc., use Interface language above.
ai.includeSequencesHint: Send chain sequences in AI context (truncated).
ai.compactContextHint: Shorter sequences and snippets to save tokens.
ai.autoOpenChatHint: Open assistant panel when using Explain buttons.
ai.residuePanelHint: Show anchored analysis panel after residue pick in the viewport.
ai.apiKeysHint: Paste your provider keys below. They stay in this browser and requests go directly to the provider — no server .env needed.
ai.clientKeysNote: Keys are stored locally on this device and sent only to the provider API.
ai.phaeleonContextNote: Phaeleon injects the current drug pair and rule-based interaction report into AI context automatically. Configure providers and response language above.
